name: Need for Madness
author: Poki
description: Need for Madness is a car game where you can win by racing or wasting! Choose to either cross the finish line first in a high-speed race or destroy all opponents by crashing into them in chaotic car combat. Perform wild stunts like flips and spins. The more stunts you do, the more powerful and faster your car becomes! Are you a racer or a wrecker? How to play Need for Madness? Drive: WASD or the arrow keys Handbrake: the space bar Look back: X and Z Who created Need for Madness? Need for Madness is created by Radical Play. Play their other games on Poki: Sky Mad , Soccer Skills World Cup , Soccer Skills Euro Cup and Soccer Skills Champions League ! How can I play Need for Madness for free? You can play Need for Madness for free on Poki. Can I play Need for Madness on mobile devices and desktop? Need for Madness can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
